title: HUNT-841 Surrounded by female employees on a company trip, a man is my one king game! I got a job at a company full of women. Every day, I'm played to make tea and chores, so even if I go to a hot spring inn on a company trip, the situation is the same and I can't relax at all.
overview: I'm the only man in a company with only strong female employees. In such a situation, I also go on a company trip ... Of course, if I thought that it would be a restless employee trip that would be treated as a servant ... in a ridiculous situation! In a rainy day king game, it becomes a super-dreadnought ruckus and erotic memories are in full swing! I got the hit stick with the king's mark and I became invincible!
